title: hypericum fallax var. quadrangulare
intro: Hypericum fallax var. quadrangulare, also known as the St. John's Wort variant, is a plant species that belongs to the Hypericaceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Hypericum fallax var. quadrangulare include its ability to reduce anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and enhance cognitive function, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of this plant often include teas, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
